finding_results.notes: Kai no longer backs off after a single thin plea. He keeps the call button in hand, states he would have called anywhere outside the medical wing, and only stands down after defining explicit limits on what he will and will not cover.

The scene now reaches the key disclosure inventory once, then moves directly into Margot's choice. The later Petra/log re-proof is cut so the close lands on concealment plus craving instead of another explanation pass.
Petra's entrance is now framed through pressure and posture rather than repeating the adjacent-chapter grey-hair description.

Lena's medical-wing entry no longer repeats the prior chapter's smell-led inventory. The passage now pivots through conditioned bodily memory from Zug, which preserves association without reusing the entry template.

summary: Revised chapter 06 in place to remove adjacent-chapter repetition, make Kai's refusal to summon staff materially harder-won, compress the Margot ending so the concealment lands harder, and eliminate the repeated 'corridor' tic while preserving the chapter's systemic-threat escalation and Lena/Kai bond beat.
